title: plagiobothrys hirtus var. corallicarpus
intro: Plagiobothrys hirtus var. corallicarpus, also known as Coral-fruited Poppy-spurge, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Plagiobothrys hirtus var. corallicarpus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
